task: Update, upgrade, and automate FlexNetOS/.github — fix all CI failures, warnings, conflicts, and polish the repo

stories.title: Fix reusable-lint.yml CI failure (606 markdownlint errors)
stories.description: bunx markdownlint-cli2 in reusable-lint.yml scans .claude/.omc/wiki/ files because it only excludes .omc/** (not .claude/.omc/**). 606 errors on every push.
acceptanceCriteria: reusable-lint.yml excludes '!.claude/.omc/**' and '!.claude/**/.omc/**' from markdownlint-cli2 patterns
Local dry-run of the markdownlint command returns 0 errors on relevant .claude/.omc/wiki files
The lint CI job for this branch passes (verified via gh run list after push)

stories.title: Fix Issue #18 — 18 broken wikilinks in wiki-lint check
stories.description: wiki-lint.yml greps ALL of wiki/ including schema.md, AGENTS.md, README.md which contain example [[wikilinks]] as documentation. Should only check wiki/pages/ for real broken links.
acceptanceCriteria: wiki-lint.yml 'Find broken wikilinks' step uses 'wiki/pages/' as search root, not 'wiki/'
Local simulation of the wiki-lint broken-link check returns 0 broken wikilinks
Issue #18 is closed with a comment explaining the fix

stories.title: Resolve PR #24 merge conflicts (feat/todo-session-2026-05-28-006)
stories.description: PR #24 (Feat/todo session 2026 05 28 006) is CONFLICTING/DIRTY. Determine if it should be rebased or closed as stale.
acceptanceCriteria: PR #24 is either closed with a clear rationale comment, or rebased so mergeable != CONFLICTING
No uncommitted conflicts remain in the feat/todo-session-2026-05-28-006 branch

stories.title: Resolve PR #22 conflicts (current branch feat/session-2026-05-29-002)
stories.description: PR #22 (chore: sync session state for SESSION-2026-05-29-001) is CONFLICTING. Current branch has many newer commits. Rebase or close.
acceptanceCriteria: PR #22 is either closed (if stale) or updated so it is no longer CONFLICTING
Current working branch is clean and CI passes
